results.title: Anya Taylor-Joy’s Lucky Gets New Sun-Scorched Poster After Trailer Launch
results.description: Anya Taylor-Joy‘s upcoming Apple TV show Lucky got a new official poster. This comes shortly after the trailer, which reminded subscribers of its summer release. Lucky gets official poster after trailer release Apple TV shared a new poster for Lucky on X (formerly Twitter).
